name: Management Plane Groups - Privileged
description: Groups that gate full-service workload access with direct data impact. Classification follows the Clean Source principle: a group is Management Plane/Privileged if membership grants access equivalent to Exchange Administrator, SharePoint Administrator, Intune Administrator, Teams Administrator, or similar blast-radius roles. Also applies to groups with Owner or Contributor on critical Azure subscriptions.

groups.notes: Shadow group assigned to Exchange Administrator role. Membership grants full mailbox access across all users including executives.
Shadow group assigned to Intune Administrator role. Membership grants device management and software deployment across all enrolled devices.
